title: About PAUDC 2026
content:
# Welcome to PAUDC 2026

PAUDC (Pan African University Debate Championship) is the largest inter-varsity debate tournament in Africa. The 2026 edition will be hosted by Veritas University in Abuja, Nigeria.

## Our Theme

**The Republic of Reason: Building Africa's Future Through Debate**

We believe that rigorous intellectual engagement and reasoned debate are essential for Africa's development.
meta_description: Information about the Pan African University Debate Championship 2026 hosted by Veritas University.
